fields.title: Remove workflow-cli prototype from live repo surfaces

fields.acceptance_criteria: Canonical rules and generated instructions no longer reference workflow-cli or workflow docs commands; the root workspace no longer includes the workflow-cli crate; the prototype crate directory is removed; validation confirms no remaining live repo surfaces point at the wrapper prototype
